query: Hvilke ministerier findes der på retsinformation.dk?
criteria: Response should fetch GET https://www.retsinformation.dk/api/ressort and return a list of ministries with id and name fields. Response should be in Danish.

query: Get the full HTML text of the Danish law with accession number A19890001
criteria: Response should construct the ELI URL https://www.retsinformation.dk/eli/accn/A19890001/html (or /dan/html) to retrieve the raw HTML content, rather than using /api/document/{id}. Should explain the ELI URL pattern.

query: kan du give mig en liste over alle dokumenttyper der findes i retsinformations register?
criteria: Response should call GET /api/documentClassificationfilter and return the tree with top-level Regler and Afgørelser, listing documentTypeId and name/popularName for each entry.

query: Show me the legislative timeline for document id 12345
criteria: Response should call GET https://www.retsinformation.dk/api/document/12345/timeline to retrieve the legislative history array.

query: Hvad betyder dokumenttype-koden 'lbkh' i ELI URL'er?
criteria: Response should reference /api/eli/routing-data and indicate that lbkh maps to documentTypeId 30 (Lovbekendtgørelse). Could also reference /api/eli/named-authority-lists.

query: I need to enumerate every single page on retsinformation.dk - how do I do that?
criteria: Response should point to https://www.retsinformation.dk/sitemap.xml as a single XML sitemap containing all URL entries. Should mention there is no public search API.

query: find alle love under Justitsministeriet
criteria: Response should explain there is no public search API and suggest using /api/extremesearch/GetLawRegisters (hierarchical tree by ministry/topic) or /api/ressort to find the ministry, possibly combined with the client-side extremesearch. Should be in Danish.

query: What's the URL pattern for an EU CELEX directive on retsinformation?
criteria: Response should mention the /eli/eu/{celex} pattern, e.g. /eli/eu/CELEX:31989L0048.

query: hent metadata for dokument 987654
criteria: Response should call GET /api/document/metadata/987654 to retrieve structured metadata. Should be in Danish.

query: Are there any active maintenance notices on retsinformation right now?
criteria: Response should fetch GET https://www.retsinformation.dk/api/maintenance/messages and report the result (usually empty array).

query: list the parliamentary case history statuses
criteria: Response should call GET /api/extremesearch/getcasehistorystatus and list statuses such as Afvist, Beretning afgivet, Bortfaldet, Delt, Forkastet, Igangværende, Tilbagetaget, Vedtaget.

query: Hvad er forskellen på en kanonisk CST URI og et accession-alias i ELI?
criteria: Response should explain canonicalCst pattern /{pubMedia}/{year}/{number} vs accn_alias /eli/accn/{accn}, ideally referencing /api/eli/documentation/uri-templates. Response in Danish.

query: give me references and related documents for retsinformation document 55555
criteria: Response should use GET /api/document/documentLinks/55555/references/{showRelated} endpoint to retrieve references like changes, commenced by, etc.

query: kan jeg søge efter love via et offentligt API?
criteria: Response should clearly state that there is NO public search API on retsinformation.dk - search is client-side via extremesearch form. Should suggest alternatives like the sitemap or filter trees. Response in Danish.

query: I want a flat A-Z list of all law registers
criteria: Response should call GET /api/lawregistry which returns a flat list of {id, label, key} entries (as opposed to the hierarchical /api/extremesearch/GetLawRegisters).

query: Hvilke ELI ontologi-metadata-egenskaber findes for en LegalResource?
criteria: Response should call GET /api/eli/documentation/metadata-types and reference the LegalResource key (along with Expression, Manifestation, Item).

query: fetch the Danish text version of regulation /retsinfo/1989/0001
criteria: Response should construct the URL https://www.retsinformation.dk/retsinfo/1989/0001/dan (or /dan/html) to retrieve the Danish text content using the canonical CST pattern with /dan suffix.

query: What subject tags / FOB tags are available?
criteria: Response should call GET /api/extremesearch/GetFobTags to retrieve hierarchical FOB subject tags with {value, title, children} shape.

query: do I need to log in or get an API key to use these endpoints?
criteria: Response should clearly state that retsinformation.dk requires NO authentication, is fully anonymous, and free to use. Should also note APIs are undocumented and may change.

query: Hvilke ministerier hører under Folketingets Ombudsmand?
criteria: Response should call GET /api/ressort/fob to retrieve the ministries under the Parliamentary Ombudsman. Response in Danish.
